sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19465" key="barupe/nqhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βᾰρυ-πένθητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n19465.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mourning heavily,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.743</biblScope> </bibl> (Antip.).</sense> </entryFree>
